expressions.name: _fn_ConvertCatalog
expressions.expression:
let 
    Source = (catalog as any) => let 
    Source = catalog, 
    ConvertToTable = #table(1, {{Source}}), 
    Split = Table.SplitColumn(ConvertToTable, "Column1", Splitter.SplitTextByEachDelimiter({"_"}, QuoteStyle.Csv, true), {"Catalog"}), 
    AddEnv = Table.ReplaceValue(Split, each [Catalog], each [Catalog] & _DbxEnvironmentSuffix,Replacer.ReplaceText,{"Catalog"}), 
    ConvertToValue = List.Max(AddEnv[Catalog]) 
in 
    ConvertToValue 
in 
Source

expressions.name: _fn_GetDataFromDBX
expressions.expression:
let 
    func = (_DbxCatalog as text, _DbxDatabase as text, _DbxTable as text) => let 
        Source = Databricks.Catalogs(_DbxServer, _DbxEndpoint, []), 
        catalog_Database = Source{[Name=_fn_ConvertCatalog(_DbxCatalog),Kind="Database"]}[Data], 
        default_Schema = catalog_Database{[Name=_DbxDatabase,Kind="Schema"]}[Data], 
        Table = default_Schema{[Name=_DbxTable,Kind="Table"]}[Data] 
    in 
        Table 
in 
    func

tables.name: @Dataset Metadata
partitionExpressions:
let
 Refresh = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.FromList(List.DateTimes(DateTime.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()), 1, #duration(0, 0, 0, 0)), Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Last Data Refresh (UTC)"}, null, ExtraValues.Error), {{"Last Data Refresh (UTC)", type datetime}}),
#"Added Environment" = Table.AddColumn(Refresh, "Environment", each _Environment),
#"Added BuildNumber" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Environment", "Build Number", each _BuildNumber)

 in
#"Added BuildNumber"

tables.name: @Measures
partitionExpressions:
let
 Source = Table.FromRows(Json.Document(Binary.Decompress(Binary.FromText("i44FAA==", BinaryEncoding.Base64), Compression.Deflate)), let _t = ((type nullable text) meta [Serialized.Text = true]) in type table [Column1 = _t])

 in
Source

measures.name: Average Sales Units Per Day LY
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Dim Date Sk])

VAR LYDates =

        VALUES('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year]),

RETURN

measures.name: Billed Quantity O/U Index Parent %
measures.expression:
VAR SupplierSiteNameImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Sku Supplier Name])
    )
VAR BrandSizeDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Sku Size])
    )
VAR ProductOptionCodeImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Option Id])
    )
VAR ProductOptionDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Description])
    )
VAR ProductGroupDescription = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Product Group])
    )
VAR ProductHierarchyGroupDescription = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Group])
    )
VAR SubcategoryDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Subcategory])
    )
VAR CategoryDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Category])
    )
VAR BuyingGroupDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group])
    )
VAR BusinessModelDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Business Model])
    )
VAR ProductDivisionDescriptionImpact =
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Division])
    )
VAR DivisionDescriptionImpact =
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Division])
    )
VAR BrandGroupImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Billed Sales Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
    )


VAR ImpactDynamic = 
IF(
        ISINSCOPE(Product[Sku Supplier Name]),
        DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],SupplierSiteNameImpact),
    IF(
        ISINSCOPE(Product[Sku Size]),
        DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],BrandSizeDescriptionImpact),
        IF(
            ISINSCOPE(Product[Option Id]),
            DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],ProductOptionCodeImpact),
            IF(
                ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Description]),
                DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],ProductOptionDescriptionImpact),
                IF(
                    ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Product Group]),
                    DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],ProductGroupDescription),
                       IF(
                    ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Group]),
                    DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],ProductHierarchyGroupDescription), 
                    IF(
                        ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Subcategory]),
                        DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],SubcategoryDescriptionImpact),
                        IF(
                            ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Category]),
                            DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],CategoryDescriptionImpact),
                            IF(
                            ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Division]),
                            DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],ProductDivisionDescriptionImpact),
                            IF(
                                ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
                                DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],BuyingGroupDescriptionImpact),
                                IF(
                                    ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Business Model]),
                                    DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],BusinessModelDescriptionImpact),
                                    IF(
                                        ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Division]),
                                        DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],DivisionDescriptionImpact),
                                        IF(
                                            ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]),
                                            DIVIDE( [Billed Sales Quantity],BrandGroupImpact)
                                        )
                                        )
                                    )
                                    )
                                )
                                )
                            )
                        )
                    )

                )
            )
        )
    )

RETURN ImpactDynamic

measures.name: Billed Sales Quantity HTD
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
 
VAR HTDDates =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        DISTINCT('Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk Htd]),
        'Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates
    )
 
RETURN
IF(
    ISEMPTY(HTDDates),
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE(
        [Billed Sales Quantity],
        REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
        TREATAS(HTDDates,'Date'[Calendar Date])
    )
)

measures.name: Billed Sales Quantity LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Billed Sales Quantity],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Billed Sales Value LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Billed Sales Value],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Billed Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Days Since Earliest Go Live Date
measures.expression:
VAR LaunchDate =
   SELECTEDVALUE ('Product'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date])
/*VAR EndDate =
   MAX ( 'Date'[Calendar Date])*/
VAR EndDate = IF (
                  ISINSCOPE( 'Date'[Calendar Date]),
                 MAX('Date'[Calendar Date]),
                TODAY() -1
               ) 
RETURN
IF (
   NOT ISBLANK ( LaunchDate ) 
   && EndDate >= LaunchDate,
   DATEDIFF ( LaunchDate, EndDate, DAY )
)

measures.name: Days in Stock LTD > 0 Unit
measures.expression:
VAR GoLive =
    MIN('Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date])
 
VAR EndDate =
    MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
 
RETURN
IF(
    ISBLANK(GoLive) || YEAR(GoLive) = 9999,
    BLANK(),
    COUNTROWS(
        FILTER(
            ALL('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            'Date'[Calendar Date] >= GoLive &&
            'Date'[Calendar Date] <= EndDate &&
            CALCULATE(
                [Retail Sales Quantity],
                KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Option'[Option Id]))
            ) > 0
        )
    )
)

measures.name: Days in Stock LTD > 40 Units
measures.expression:
VAR GoLive =
    MIN('Option'[Option Earliest Global Go Live Date])
 
VAR EndDate =
    MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
 
RETURN

    COUNTROWS(
        FILTER(
            ALL('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            'Date'[Calendar Date] >= GoLive &&
            'Date'[Calendar Date] <= EndDate &&
            CALCULATE(
                [Retail Sales Quantity],

            ) > 40
        )
    )

measures.name: Retail Physical Return Buy Value HTD
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =
        VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
 
    VAR HTDDates =
        CALCULATETABLE(
            DISTINCT('Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk Htd]),
            'Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates
        )
 
    RETURN
    IF(
        ISEMPTY(HTDDates),
        BLANK(),
        CALCULATE(
            [Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
            REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
            TREATAS(HTDDates,'Date'[Calendar Date])
        )

measures.name: Retail Physical Return Buy Value WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek     = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf     = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear     = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
 
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
 
    HasDate,
        SUMX(
            VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
            RETURN
                CALCULATE(
                    [Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
                    FILTER(
                        ALL('Date'),
                        'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
                        'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
                    )
                )
        ),
 
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE([Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
            FILTER(ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),
 
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE([Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
            FILTER(ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),
 
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE([Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
            FILTER(ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        ),
 
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE([Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
            'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
            'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
        ),
 
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE([Retail Physical Return Buy Value],
            FILTER(ALL('Date'),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
            )
        )
)

)

measures.name: Retail Return Value WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
 
RETURN
SWITCH(
TRUE(),
 
HasDate,
SUMX(
VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
RETURN
CALCULATE(
[Retail Return Value],
FILTER(
ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate
)
)
),
 
HasFinWeek,
CALCULATE(
[Retail Return Value],
FILTER(
ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
)
),
 
HasFinMonth,
CALCULATE(
[Retail Return Value],
FILTER(
ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
)
),
 
HasFinQuarter,
CALCULATE(
[Retail Return Value],
FILTER(
ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
)
),
 
HasFinHalf,
CALCULATE(
[Retail Return Value],
'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
),
 
HasFinYear,
CALCULATE(
[Retail Return Value],
FILTER(
ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
)
)
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Quantity LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Retail Sales Quantity],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

    )
)

measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate = TodayDate - 1
VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR MaxSelectedDate = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR IsTodayInFilter = CONTAINS(SelectedDates,'Date'[Calendar Date],TodayDate)
VAR SnapshotDate = IF(IsTodayInFilter,YesterdayDate,MaxSelectedDate)
VAR LY1Dates =
CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year Minus 1]),
'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] = SnapshotDate)
VAR LY1DateFilterTable =
FILTER(ALL('Date'[Calendar Date]),'Date'[Calendar Date] IN LY1Dates)
RETURN
IF(ISEMPTY(LY1Dates),BLANK(),
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
LY1DateFilterTable))

VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN SWITCH(TRUE(),
HasDate,
SUMX(VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
RETURN CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate))) ,
HasFinWeek,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]))) ,
HasFinMonth,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]))) ,
HasFinQuarter,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]))) ,
HasFinHalf,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])) ,
HasFinYear,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Quantity],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])))
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Reduced Tax Value LY-1
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate = TodayDate - 1
VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR MaxSelectedDate = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR IsTodayInFilter = CONTAINS(SelectedDates,'Date'[Calendar Date],TodayDate)
VAR SnapshotDate = IF(IsTodayInFilter,YesterdayDate,MaxSelectedDate)
VAR LY1Dates =
CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year Minus 1]),
'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] = SnapshotDate)
VAR LY1DateFilterTable =
FILTER(ALL('Date'[Calendar Date]),'Date'[Calendar Date] IN LY1Dates)
RETURN
IF(ISEMPTY(LY1Dates),BLANK(),
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Reduced Tax Value],
REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
LY1DateFilterTable))

measures.name: Retail Sales Value LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Retail Sales Value],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Retail Sales Value],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Value LY WTD
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear  = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])
RETURN SWITCH(TRUE(),
HasDate,
SUMX(VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]),
VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
VAR CurrentWeek = CALCULATE(MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = CurrentDate)
RETURN CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = CurrentWeek &&
'Date'[Calendar Date] <= CurrentDate))) ,
HasFinWeek,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]))) ,
HasFinMonth,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Month Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]))) ,
HasFinQuarter,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id]))) ,
HasFinHalf,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Half Id]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])) ,
HasFinYear,
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
FILTER(ALL('Date'),
'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year]) &&
'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])))
)

measures.name: Retail Sales Value LY-1
measures.expression:
VAR TodayDate = TODAY()
VAR YesterdayDate = TodayDate - 1
VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR MaxSelectedDate = MAX('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR IsTodayInFilter = CONTAINS(SelectedDates,'Date'[Calendar Date],TodayDate)
VAR SnapshotDate = IF(IsTodayInFilter,YesterdayDate,MaxSelectedDate)
VAR LY1Dates =
CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year Minus 1]),
'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] = SnapshotDate)
VAR LY1DateFilterTable =
FILTER(ALL('Date'[Calendar Date]),'Date'[Calendar Date] IN LY1Dates)
RETURN
IF(ISEMPTY(LY1Dates),BLANK(),
CALCULATE([Retail Sales Value],
REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
LY1DateFilterTable))

measures.name: Return Quantity HTD
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =
        VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date])
 
    VAR HTDDates =
        CALCULATETABLE(
            DISTINCT('Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk Htd]),
            'Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates
        )
 
    RETURN
    IF(
        ISEMPTY(HTDDates),
        BLANK(),
        CALCULATE(
            [Return Quantity],
            REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
            TREATAS(HTDDates,'Date'[Calendar Date])
        )
    )

measures.name: Return Quantity LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Return Quantity],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Return Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Return Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Return Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Return Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Return Quantity],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

    )
)

measures.name: Return Quantity O/U Index Parent %
measures.expression:
VAR SupplierSiteNameImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Sku Supplier Name])
    )
VAR BrandSizeDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Sku Size])
    )
VAR ProductOptionCodeImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Option Id])
    )
VAR ProductOptionDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
        [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Description])
    )
VAR ProductGroupDescription = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Product Group])
    )
VAR ProductHierarchyGroupDescription = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Group])
    )
VAR SubcategoryDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Subcategory])
    )
VAR CategoryDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Category])
    )
VAR BuyingGroupDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group])
    )
VAR BusinessModelDescriptionImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Business Model])
    )
VAR ProductDivisionDescriptionImpact =
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Hierarchy Division])
    )
VAR DivisionDescriptionImpact =
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Division])
    )
VAR BrandGroupImpact = 
    CALCULATE(
         [Return Quantity],
        ALLSELECTED(Product[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group])
    )


VAR ImpactDynamic = 
IF(
        ISINSCOPE(Product[Sku Supplier Name]),
        DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],SupplierSiteNameImpact),
    IF(
        ISINSCOPE(Product[Sku Size]),
        DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],BrandSizeDescriptionImpact),
        IF(
            ISINSCOPE(Product[Option Id]),
            DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],ProductOptionCodeImpact),
            IF(
                ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Description]),
                DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],ProductOptionDescriptionImpact),
                IF(
                    ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Product Group]),
                    DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],ProductGroupDescription),
                    IF(
                    ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Group]),
                    DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],ProductHierarchyGroupDescription), 
                    IF(
                        ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Subcategory]),
                        DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],SubcategoryDescriptionImpact),
                        IF(
                            ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Category]),
                            DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],CategoryDescriptionImpact),
                            
                            IF(
                                ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Hierarchy Division]),
                                DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],ProductDivisionDescriptionImpact), 
                            IF(
                                ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Buying Group]),
                                DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],BuyingGroupDescriptionImpact),
                                IF(
                                    ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Business Model]),
                                    DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],BusinessModelDescriptionImpact),
                                    IF(
                                        ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Division]),
                                        DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],DivisionDescriptionImpact),
                                        IF(
                                            ISINSCOPE(Product[Product Buyrarchy Brand Group]),
                                            DIVIDE( [Return Quantity],BrandGroupImpact)
                                        )
                                        )
                                        )
                                    )
                                    )
                                )
                            )
                        )
                    )

                )
            )
        )
    )

RETURN ImpactDynamic

measures.name: Return Reduced Tax Value HTD LY
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

-- 1) Current → LY
VAR LYDates =
    CALCULATETABLE (
        DISTINCT ( 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year] ),
        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates,
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Daily Financial Transform' )
    )

-- 2) LY → HTD (within LY half)
VAR HTDLYDates =
    CALCULATETABLE (
        DISTINCT ( 'Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk Htd] ),
        'Daily Financial Half to Date'[Dim Date Sk] IN LYDates,
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Daily Financial Half to Date' )
    )

RETURN
IF (
    ISEMPTY ( HTDLYDates ),
    BLANK (),
    CALCULATE (
        [Return Reduced Tax Value],
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),
        'Date'[Calendar Date] IN HTDLYDates
    )
)

measures.name: Return Reduced Tax Value HTD
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =
    VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR YTDDates =
    SELECTCOLUMNS (
        FILTER (
            ALL ( 'Daily Financial Year to Date' ),
            'Daily Financial Year to Date'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates
        ),
        "Calendar Date",
        'Daily Financial Year to Date'[Dim Date Sk Ytd]
    )

RETURN
IF (
    ISEMPTY ( YTDDates ),
    BLANK (),
    CALCULATE (
        [Return Reduced Tax Value],
        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),
        TREATAS ( YTDDates, 'Date'[Calendar Date] )
    )
)

        'Date'[Calendar date] IN LWDates
    )
)

VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Dim Date Sk])

VAR LYDates =

        VALUES('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Year]),
        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates
    )

RETURN

    [Total Customers],
    REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
    REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
    'Order Line'[Dim Billed Transaction Date Sk] IN LYDates
)

measures.name: Total Customers WOW %

measures.name: Total Customers YD-1
measures.expression: VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Calendar Date]) VAR YesterdayDates = SELECTCOLUMNS( FILTER( ALL('Daily Financial Transform'), 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates ), "Calendar Date", 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Yesterday] ) VAR YD1Dates = SELECTCOLUMNS( FILTER( ALL('Daily Financial Transform'), 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN YesterdayDates ), "Calendar Date", 'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Yesterday] ) RETURN CALCULATE( [Total Customers], REMOVEFILTERS('Date'), REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'), TREATAS(YD1Dates,'Date'[Calendar Date]) )

measures.name: Total Customers Yesterday
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates =

    VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] )

VAR YesterdayDates =

    SELECTCOLUMNS (FILTER (ALL ( 'Daily Financial Transform' ),

            'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates

        ),

        "Calendar Date",

        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Yesterday]

    )

RETURN

IF (ISEMPTY ( YesterdayDates ),

    BLANK (),

    CALCULATE (        [Total Customers],

        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Date' ),

        REMOVEFILTERS ( 'Time Period' ),

        TREATAS (            YesterdayDates,

            'Date'[Calendar Date]

        ))

)

measures.name: Total Orders LM
measures.expression:
VAR HasDate       = ISFILTERED('Date'[Calendar Date])
VAR HasFinWeek    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Week Id])
VAR HasFinMonth   = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Month Id])
VAR HasFinQuarter = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id])
VAR HasFinHalf    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year Half Id])
VAR HasFinYear    = ISFILTERED('Date'[Financial Year])

RETURN
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    // Calendar Date → shift by -1 month
    HasDate,
        SUMX (
            VALUES ( 'Date'[Calendar Date] ),
            VAR CurrentDate = 'Date'[Calendar Date]
            VAR LMDate =
                IF (
                    NOT ISBLANK ( CurrentDate ),
                    EOMONTH ( CurrentDate, -1 ) + DAY ( CurrentDate )
                )
            RETURN
                CALCULATE (
                    [Total Orders],
                    FILTER ( ALL ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Calendar Date] = LMDate )
                )
        ),

    // Financial Week → subtract ~4 weeks (28 days)
    HasFinWeek,
        CALCULATE (
            [Total Orders],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Week Id] ) - 4
            )
        ),

    // Financial Month → previous month
    HasFinMonth,
        CALCULATE (
            [Total Orders],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Month Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Quarter → last quarter (unchanged)
    HasFinQuarter,
        CALCULATE (
            [Total Orders],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Quarter Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Half → last half (unchanged)
    HasFinHalf,
        CALCULATE (
            [Total Orders],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year Half Id] ) - 1
            )
        ),

    // Financial Year → last year (unchanged)
    HasFinYear,
        CALCULATE (
            [Total Orders],
            FILTER (
                ALL ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Financial Year] = MAX ( 'Date'[Financial Year] ) - 1
            )
        )
)

measures.name: Total Orders LW
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDates = VALUES('Date'[Calendar date])
VAR LWDates =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        DISTINCT('Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk Last Week]),
        'Daily Financial Transform'[Dim Date Sk] IN SelectedDates)
RETURN
IF(
    ISEMPTY(LWDates),
    BLANK(),
    CALCULATE(
        [Total Orders],
        REMOVEFILTERS('Date'),
        REMOVEFILTERS('Time Period'),
        'Date'[Calendar date] IN LWDates
    )
)
